parsed.explanation: I fixed malformed XML structure and tag consistency while preserving the historical text as much as possible. Main repairs: (1) removed improperly nested <BIBL> blocks and closed entries correctly; (2) added missing <AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> where a new bibliographic item clearly began; (3) normalized one inconsistent <PRICE> tag to <PRIZE> to match the rest; (4) escaped ampersands as &; (5) corrected malformed/garbled character sequences (e.g., Bücher, Preiß, groß, mäßige, ß, and dagger sign †) where they were clear encoding artifacts; (6) normalized a few broken punctuation patterns around <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>-ibid. into valid text with proper tag closure; (7) kept original spelling variants and bibliographic wording otherwise unchanged.
